Phoenix Auto Recycling

Industrial Recycling Solutions

A centralized approach to automotive scrap and vehicle recycling across the Phoenix Valley.

Junk Car Buying

Free towing. No title? No problem.

Sedans, trucks, vans, SUVs, and fleets
Damaged, off-road, or non-running vehicles
Insurance totals and flood vehicles

01

Catalytic Converter Recycling

Safe, compliant, premium payouts.

All makes and models, OEM & aftermarket
Complete or cut-out converters
Fleet parts and catalytic cores

Operations
02

Engine & Transmission Buying

Top dollar for motors & drivetrains.

Gas, diesel, hybrid, and electric motors
Manual/automatic transmissions, transfer cases
Running or salvage units

Operations
03

Scrap Metal & Auto Recycling

We recycle cars, scrap rigs, and metal bins.

Complete vehicle recycling & disassembly
Ferrous & non-ferrous scrap metals
Certificates for environmental compliance

Operations
04

Bulk Pickup? Custom Rates.

Professional paperwork and the best scrap rates in Arizona. We make the heavy lifting look easy.
